name: IndusInd Crest Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹4,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 6 Reward Points per ₹100 spent on weekends (Saturday & Sunday)
4 Reward Points per ₹100 spent on weekdays
2X on partner brand spends (effectively 8 RP/₹100 on weekdays)

welcomeBenefits.description: 5,000 bonus Reward Points on card activation

additionalBenefits: 8 domestic + 2 international lounge visits per year
Fuel surcharge waiver up to ₹300 per month
Concierge services for travel and lifestyle bookings
pros: Strong weekday earn rate of 4 RP/₹100, even better at 6 RP on weekends
2X multiplier on partner brands stacks well with base rates
Good lounge access with 8 domestic + 2 international visits
cons: Annual fee of ₹2,999 with ₹4L waiver threshold is relatively high
Only 2 international lounge visits per year
Point value of ₹0.50 limits effective return rate
Partner brand list may be limited
idealFor: Consistent spenders who can benefit from high weekday and weekend earn rates
Users who spend frequently with IndusInd partner brands
Premium card seekers looking for strong all-round rewards with lounge access

faqs.question: How do the weekday and weekend reward rates differ?
faqs.answer: The Crest card earns 4 RP per ₹100 on weekdays (Monday to Friday) and 6 RP per ₹100 on weekends (Saturday and Sunday). Partner brand spends earn an additional 2X multiplier on top of these rates.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹2,999 annual fee is waived if you spend ₹4,00,000 or more in the previous anniversary year.

faqs.question: What partner brands offer 2X rewards?
faqs.answer: IndusInd periodically updates the list of partner brands. Common partners include select lifestyle, fashion, and electronics brands. Check the IndusInd rewards section for the current partner list.

faqs.question: Does the Crest card offer international lounge access?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Crest card provides 2 complimentary international lounge visits per year via Priority Pass, in addition to 8 domestic lounge visits.
